customAttributes.description:
Please Note: This printing of Aether Channeler features a metallic Top 8 stamp commemorating a Store Championship Top 8 win, and a Store Name. The Store Name on the card you will receive will be RANDOM For a non-randomized version of this Store Championship Promo, please shop Listings with Photos.

When Aether Channeler enters the battlefield, choose one —
• Create a 1/1 white Bird creature token with flying.
• Return another target nonland permanent to its owner's hand.
• Draw a card.

details.setUrlName: Game Day and Store Championship Promos
